prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京化工大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约7335名、7592名、7894名、9504名、6772名。2024年出现明显后移至9504名，2025年大幅回升至 6772名，波动较大。2025年基准位次约6772名，较2024年回升约2732名，反映出该校在天津的报考热度有所恢复；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021年115人、2 022年118人、2023年118人、2024年130人、2025年131人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势。2026年计划增至140人（较2025年增加9人，扩幅约6.9%），扩招使竞争略有缓解，位次数字趋于 增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京化工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名从2021年第62名持续上升至2026年第57名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力和声誉增强 ，对考生吸引力有所提升；该校2024年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情。抖音学校热度总排名第7（高热），短视频平台曝光度高，张雪峰等知名人士多 次推荐，报考关注度较高，有利于吸引考生；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A，材料科学与工程、化学获评A-，共3个A-及以上学科。化工、材料等王 牌专业与该校招生专业高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热推荐，该校在天津招生涵盖 计算机类、自动化类等热门方向，有利于吸引高分考生。天津市2026年普通高考考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增加约14%，考生规模扩大使整体竞争加剧。 天津本科批2021–2025年从463分升至476分，整体平稳略升；北京化工大学位于北京市，与天津邻近，对天津考生具有天然的地域吸引力。该校在天津招生计划 较大（2026年140人），属于在天津投放较多名额的京校之一，有利于维持稳定的报考热度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升的走势、2026年扩招约6.9%的缓解效应、 学校排名持续上升的利好、抖音高热度的关注度加持，以及天津市考生总数增加约14%带来的竞争加剧，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年6772名基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次 约7081名，区间6581–7581名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（电子信息工程、人工智能、计算机科学与技术）
- 材料科学与工程（材料、大数据双学士学位）
- 工科试验班（宏德书院，含化学工程与工艺、高分子材料与工程）
- 自动化类（自动化、测控技术与仪器）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 法学（卓越实验班）
- 工科试验班（高端装备与智能制造，含机械设计制造及其自动化、过程装备与控制工程、机器人工程）
- 化学工程与工艺（化工、大数据双学士学位）
- 理科试验班（数学、物理电子与管理）
- 化学（化学、生工双学士学位）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（先进材料，含高分子材料与工程、材料科学与工程、功能材料）
- 工科试验班（化工能源与生物医药，含化学工程与工艺、能源化学工程、环境工程等）
- 理科试验班（绿色化学，含应用化学、能源化学、资源化学）
- 工商管理类（新文科经管法，含财务管理、会计学、工商管理、国际经济与贸易等）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约7081名，区间6581–7581名。位次在区间下限（6581名以内）可重点冲刺一档的计算机类、材料科学与工程双学位、宏德书院等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约6800–7 300名）建议以二档的法学卓越实验班、化工大数据双学位、理科试验班等为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（7300名以上）建议以三档的工科试验班（先进材料/化工能源） 、工商管理类等保底，同时可尝试二档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing University of Chemical Technology in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 7335, 7592, 7894, 9504, and 6772 respectively. In 2024, there was a significant drop to 9504, but in 2025, it rebounded sharply to 6772, showing large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 6772, an increase of approximately 2732 from 2024, reflecting a recovery in the university's popularity in Tianjin. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Tianjin was 115 in 2021, 118 in 2022, 118 in 2023, 130 in 2024, and 131 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion trend. The plan for 2026 increases to 140 (9 more than 2025, an expansion of about 6.9%), which slightly eases competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 62nd in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting an improvement in overall strength and reputation, which enhances its appeal to candidates. In 2024, its reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. The university ranks 7th in overall popularity on Douyin (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms. Well-known figures like Zhang Xuefeng have repeatedly recommended it, leading to high application attention and attracting candidates. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology received an A, Materials Science and Engineering and Chemistry received A-, totaling three A- or above disciplines. Flagship majors like chemical engineering and materials are highly aligned with the university's enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates interested in these fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. The university's enrollment in Tianjin covers popular directions like Computer Science and Automation, which helps attract high-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Tianjin Gaokao is about 82,000, an increase of approximately 14% from 71,938 in 2025, intensifying overall competition. The Tianjin undergraduate batch line rose from 463 to 476 from 2021 to 2025, showing a stable slight increase. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, which is close to Tianjin, providing natural geographical appeal to Tianjin candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment plan in Tianjin (140 in 2026), making it one of the Beijing universities with more slots in Tianjin, helping to maintain stable application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound in rankings in 2025, the easing effect of a 6.9% enrollment expansion in 2026, the positive impact of the university's rising ranking, the high attention from Douyin popularity, and the intensified competition due to a 14% increase in the number of Tianjin candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease from the 2025 ranking of 6772. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7081, with a range of 6581 to 7581.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Electronic Information Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Materials, Big Data Dual Degree)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Hongde Academy, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, Polymer Materials and Engineering)
- Automation (Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Law (Excellent Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing, including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Process Equipment and Control Engineering, Robotics Engineering)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Chemical Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics, Physics Electronics and Management)
- Chemistry (Chemistry, Bioengineering Dual Degree)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials, including Polymer Materials and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Functional Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Energy and Biomedicine, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, Energy Chemical Engineering, Environmental Engineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry, including Applied Chemistry, Energy Chemistry, Resource Chemistry)
- Business Administration (New Liberal Arts, Economics, Management and Law, including Financial Management, Accounting, Business Administration, International Economics and Trade, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 7081, with a range of 6581 to 7581. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 6581) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science, Materials Science and Engineering Dual Degree, and Hongde Academy. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 6800–7300) are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors such as Law Excellent Experimental Class, Chemical Engineering Big Data Dual Degree, and Science Experimental Class, while also attempting Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings at the upper end of the range (above 7300) are advised to use Tier 3 majors like Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials/Chemical Energy) and Business Administration as safety options, while also trying Tier 2 majors.
